expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Add a notification center with persisted read state.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Persist notification read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state to persist across sessions so that my inbox stays consistent.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification read state is stored persistently",
        "Read state survives across sessions",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Show unread badge and notification list",
      "description": "As a user, I want an unread badge and a notification list so that I can see new activity quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "The notification center shows unread badge state",
        "The notification list opens and displays notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Update notification read state backend",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification read state updates to persist so that read and unread changes are saved.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notifications can be marked read or unread",
        "The chosen read state is persisted for each notification",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add read and unread controls in notification list",
      "description": "As a user, I want read and unread controls in the notification list so that I can change status inline.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each notification row exposes read and unread controls",
        "Using the controls updates the selected notification state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Filter notifications by read state",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notifications can be filtered by read state",
        "Filter results only show matching read or unread items",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Clear all read notifications",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear read notifications so that I can keep the list tidy.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Clearing read notifications removes all currently read items",
        "Unread notifications remain in the list",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
